name: libdata-messagepack-perl
title: libdata-messagepack-perl
description:
MessagePack serializing/deserializing
Data::Messagepack converts Perl data structures to MessagePack and vice
versa.
.
MessagePack is a binary-based efficient object serialization
format. It enables to exchange structured objects between many
languages like JSON. But unlike JSON, it is very fast and small.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libdata-messagepack-perl because MessagePack serializing/deserializing.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libdata-messagepack-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libdata-messagepack-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libdata-messagepack-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
